# Irregular quad + triangular hole with a large `stalls_per_face`.
# Exercises cross-aisle insertion on a non-axis-aligned boundary with
# an unusual per-face stall budget.

polygon outer
(-48.47,0)
(750,0)
(782.80,654.85)
(0,654.85)
----
polygon outer 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (-48.470,0)-(782.800,654.850), area 517747.330

polygon hole
(275,150)
(475,150)
(375,343.66)
----
polygon hole 3 vertices, ccw, bbox (275,150)-(475,343.660), area 19366

set stalls-per-face=179
----

generate
----
total_stalls: 1083
faces: 20 (boundary: 2, interior: 18)
graph: 43 vertices, 61 edges (perimeter: 43, interior: 18)
regions: 1
